subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party enters a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: Upon entering a large cave within the Howling Pits

subject: Mutated Fire Giant with wings
fact: One mutated Fire Giant has leathery wings.
source_quote: One has leathery wings

subject: Mutated Fire Giant with extra eye
fact: One mutated Fire Giant has an extra eye.
source_quote: the other has an extra eye

subject: Ambush initiation
fact: Two Fire Giants leap from behind stalactites and attack the party.
source_quote: Two Fire Giants leap from behind stalactites, screaming as they attack

subject: Felkur's Catapult spell
fact: Felkur casts Catapult at one of the giants but deals only four points of damage.
source_quote: Felkur casts Catapult at one of the giants, but rolls extremely poorly, dealing only four points of damage

subject: First giant attacks Bramgrim
fact: The first giant strikes Bramgrim twice with its greatsword.
source_quote: The first giant moves forward and strikes Bramgrim twice with its greatsword

subject: Daein's Protective Field
fact: Daein uses his Protective Field reaction to reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points.
source_quote: Daein uses his Protective Field reaction to reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points

subject: Owlbear attacks giant
fact: The Owlbear attacks the first giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacks the first giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage

subject: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fifth level, creating a radiant aura that halves the giants' speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fifth level, creating a radiant aura that affects both giants and halves their speed

subject: Second giant knocks Bramgrim unconscious
fact: The second giant critically strikes Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage and knocking him unconscious.
source_quote: The second giant critically strikes Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage and knocking him unconscious

subject: Party flees
fact: The party decides to disengage and flee, with Daein carrying the unconscious Bramgrim.
source_quote: the party decides to disengage and flee, with Daein carrying the unconscious Bramgrim

subject: Giants resume resting
fact: The giants laugh at the retreating party and return to lying down in their cave.
source_quote: The giants laugh at the retreating party and return to lying down in their cave

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim regains consciousness and asks what happened.
source_quote: Bramgrim regains consciousness and asks what happened

subject: Party plans stealth
fact: Bramgrim suggests using Akritas's Pass Without Trace spell to sneak through the area.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests using Akritas's Pass Without Trace spell to sneak through the area

subject: Bramgrim healing
fact: Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points during a short rest.
source_quote: Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points

subject: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace
fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace, and the party attempts to sneak past the giants.
source_quote: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace, and the party attempts to sneak past the giants

subject: Felkur fails stealth check
fact: Felkur rolls a natural one on stealth, stumbling and stubbing his toe.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural one, stumbling and stubbing his toe

subject: Party rescued from stealth fail
fact: Akritas and Daein grab Bramgrim and Felkur and pull them to safety.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein, who both rolled natural twenties on initiative, quickly grab Bramgrim and Felkur and pull them to safety

subject: Giant notices disturbance
fact: One giant notices the disturbance and screams in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground before lying back down to sleep.
source_quote: One giant notices the disturbance and screams in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground before lying back down to sleep

subject: Party escapes to cave edge
fact: The party successfully escapes to the edge of the cave without further incident.
source_quote: The party successfully escapes to the edge of the cave without further incident

subject: Deep Pits section
fact: The party arrives at a section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits from which winds howl relentlessly.
source_quote: The party arrives at a section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits from which winds howl relentlessly

subject: Daein casts Fly
fact: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself.
source_quote: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself

subject: Party crosses pits
fact: Daein uses his power to transfer everyone across the pits.
source_quote: uses his power to transfer everyone across the pits

subject: Party crosses wind checks
fact: All party members successfully make acrobatics or athletics checks to maintain control against the strong winds.
source_quote: All party members, including Bramgrim and the Owlbear, successfully make their checks and safely cross the pits

subject: River of Cave Creepers cave
fact: The tunnel opens into a wide cave with an underground river fifteen feet wide cutting through it.
source_quote: The tunnel opens into a wide cave with an underground river fifteen feet wide cutting through it

subject: Cave Creeper fungus
fact: Strange gray and white fungus grows in large patches on the banks of the dark, swift-flowing river.
source_quote: Strange gray and white fungus grows in large patches on the banks of the dark, swift-flowing river

subject: Fungus identification failed
fact: Akritas and Daein fail to identify the fungus with nature checks.
source_quote: Akritas attempts to identify the fungus with a nature check but fails, as does Daein when he tries to help

subject: Bramgrim identifies Cave Creeper
fact: Bramgrim successfully identifies the fungus as Cave Creeper.
source_quote: Bramgrim, drawing on his knowledge as an Underdark creature, successfully identifies the fungus as Cave Creeper

subject: Cave Creeper effect explained
fact: Bramgrim explains that Cave Creeper is a fungus that will drive anyone mad if they touch it.
source_quote: Bramgrim explains that Cave Creeper is a fungus that will drive anyone mad if they touch it

subject: Daein scouts ahead
fact: Daein casts Fly on himself using his mandolin and scouts ahead, identifying a northern passageway as a viable route.
source_quote: Daein casts Fly on himself using his mandolin and scouts ahead, identifying a northern passageway as a viable route

subject: Party crosses river
fact: The party uses Daein's power to transfer everyone across the river one by one, carefully avoiding the Cave Creeper fungus.
source_quote: The party uses Daein's power to transfer everyone across the river one by one, carefully avoiding the Cave Creeper fungus

subject: Yellow Mold tunnel
fact: The party enters a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party enters a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits

subject: Wind spreads mold spores
fact: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold.
source_quote: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold

subject: Akritas identifies spores
fact: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they will form a cloud with the winds.
source_quote: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they will form a cloud with the winds

subject: Party holds breath
fact: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area

subject: Party resists poison
fact: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison

subject: Bramgrim takes poison damage
fact: Bramgrim fails his initial save and takes eleven points of damage.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite being resistant to poison, fails his initial save and takes eleven points of damage

subject: Bramgrim succeeds second save
fact: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects.
source_quote: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects

subject: Party immune to fumes
fact: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area.
source_quote: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area
